common.contactAdmin: Contact your administrator if you need access.

setup.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your helpdesk. This will only take a minute.
setup.step1Desc: Sign up with email or Google
setup.step2Desc: This is your organization in Zip Station
setup.step3Desc: Start creating projects and receiving tickets
setup.createAccountDesc: This will be the owner account for your helpdesk
setup.nameCompanyDesc: This is your organization in Zip Station. You can change it later.
setup.allSetDesc: Your helpdesk is ready. Create your first project to start receiving tickets.
setup.noAuthUser: No authenticated user. Please go back and sign in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noTicketsDesc: Configure your email integration and create your first project to start receiving tickets.
dashboard.capacityWarningDetail: {{percent}}% used ({{current}} / {{max}}). {{remaining}} IDs remaining. Consider increasing max length in project settings.

tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.subtitle: View and manage support tickets.
tickets.noTicketsDesc: Create a project and configure email integration to start receiving tickets.
tickets.subject: Subject
tickets.noProjectsWarning: You need to create a project first before creating tickets.

ticketDetail.notePlaceholder: Type an internal note (not visible to customer)...
ticketDetail.noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Add a reply below.
ticketDetail.statusDescOpen: New ticket — no agent reply yet
ticketDetail.statusDescPending: Agent has replied — waiting for customer response
ticketDetail.statusDescClosed: Ticket is closed — no further action needed
ticketDetail.statusDescAbandoned: No activity for an extended period

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage your helpdesk projects and their configurations.
projects.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to start organizing and receiving tickets.
projects.slugHelp: Used in URLs and ticket IDs
projects.supportEmailHelp: Inbound email for this project's tickets
projects.noMembers: No members assigned to this project yet.

projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.subtitle: Configure settings for {{name}}.
projectSettings.ticketIdMinLengthHelp: Minimum number of digits in ticket numbers
projectSettings.assignmentManualDesc: Tickets are manually assigned by agents
projectSettings.assignmentAutoRoundRobinDesc: Tickets are automatically assigned in rotation
projectSettings.languageOverrideHelp: Override the company default language for this project
projectSettings.allowUserOverrideHelp: Allow individual users to override the project language
projectSettings.ticketIdMaxLengthHelp: Maximum length before IDs grow. Capacity: ~{{capacity}} unique IDs.
projectSettings.lowCapacityWarningDetail: With min and max length of {{length}}, you can only create {{capacity}} unique ticket IDs. Consider increasing the max length for more room to grow.
projectSettings.staleTicketDesc: Tickets in "Pending" status with no reply for this many days will be flagged as stale.
projectSettings.kanbanArchiveDesc: Cards in the resolved column older than this are hidden by default. Use the "Show archived" filter to see them.
projectSettings.emailDesc: Configure how Zip Station sends and receives email for this project. You'll need both SMTP (for sending replies) and IMAP (for receiving incoming emails).
projectSettings.imapIncoming: IMAP — Incoming Email (receives emails from customers)
projectSettings.passwordSavedPlaceholder: Password saved — leave blank to keep
projectSettings.smtpOutgoing: SMTP — Outgoing Email (sends replies to customers)
projectSettings.smtpFromEmailHelp: Defaults to your username if left blank
projectSettings.contactFormParserDesc: If your app sends contact form submissions as emails, enable this to extract the real customer info from the email body.
projectSettings.contactFormSenderEmailsHelp: Comma-separated. When an email arrives FROM one of these addresses, the parser will extract the real customer info from the body instead of using the sender.
projectSettings.contactFormFieldLabelsDesc: These should match the labels in your contact form emails. For example, if your email body contains "Email: john@example.com", set the Email Label to "Email".
projectSettings.contactFormExampleTitle: Example email body the parser understands:
projectSettings.errorMinLength: Minimum length cannot be less than 3.
projectSettings.errorMaxLength: Maximum length cannot be less than minimum length.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and organization settings.
settings.comingSoon: Team management, notifications, and integrations coming soon.
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language. This overrides the company default.
settings.companyDefaultLanguageDesc: Default language for all users in the company. Users can override this in their personal settings.
settings.teamMembersDesc: Manage who has access to your organization.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: View and manage customer contacts across your projects.
customers.noCustomersDesc: Customers are automatically created when emails are received through intake.

customerDetail.name: Name
customerDetail.noTickets: No tickets found for this customer.

intake.title: Intake
intake.subtitle: Review incoming emails and approve or deny them as tickets.
intake.noEmailsDesc: Incoming emails will appear here once email polling is configured.

intakeRules.title: Intake Rules
intakeRules.subtitle: Configure automatic approval and denial rules for incoming emails.
intakeRules.deleteConfirm: Delete this rule? This cannot be undone.
intakeRules.noRulesDesc: Create rules to automatically approve or deny incoming emails based on conditions.
intakeRules.errorNoConditions: Please add at least one condition.
intakeRules.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address for the "From Email" condition.

cannedResponses.title: Canned Responses
cannedResponses.subtitle: Manage reusable response templates for quick replies.
cannedResponses.deleteConfirm: Delete this canned response? This cannot be undone.
cannedResponses.noResponsesDesc: Create reusable response templates to speed up your replies.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.subtitle: View a history of all actions performed in your organization.
auditLog.noEntriesDesc: Actions performed by team members will be recorded here.

alerts.title: Alerts & Webhooks
alerts.subtitle: Configure triggers that fire webhook notifications to Slack, Discord, or custom URLs.
alerts.deleteConfirm: Delete this alert? This cannot be undone.
alerts.noAlertsDesc: Create webhook alerts to get notified in Slack, Discord, or other services when events occur.

reports.title: Scheduled Reports
reports.subtitle: Configure automated email digests sent to your team on a recurring schedule.
reports.deleteConfirm: Delete this scheduled report? This cannot be undone.
reports.noReportsDesc: Create scheduled reports to receive automated email digests about your helpdesk activity.
